events.title: Weekend Islamic School — New Year Begins
events.description: Registration now open for the 1447-1448 school year. Qur'an, Arabic, Salah, Tawheed, and the 40 Hadith of Imam al-Nawawi.

events.title: Lecture: The Manners of the Seeker of Knowledge
events.description: A special sitting on the adab of the student of knowledge, drawing from classical works of the Salaf.
